channel.title: System on Software Developer & Entrepreneur
channel.description: Recent content in System on Software Developer & Entrepreneur

item.title: Unraid OS Windows 10 VM
item.description: A lot of the information here come from this guy. He makes really good videos to explain Unraid OS concepts. Windows 10 VMs with GPU Passthrough The purpose is to create a Windows 10 KVM VM with a dedicated GPU to have optimal performances. Stage 1: Setup the VM without any passed through hardware I. Download a copy of the latest windows 10 iso You can download the official image from here.
